publishedAbstract: * When running the command: heketi-cli--user admin--secret "${HEKETI_ADMIN_KEY}" device remove < device- id > it fails with the error: Error: The target exists, contains other items, or is in use. * How to proceed further?
publishedTitle: Why is the error "The target exists, contains other items, or is in use" popping up when removing a device using the Heketi CLI?
